name: learnpod

hypothesis.comparable: Audience-led learning brands: Bytes.dev (newsletter sponsorships), ByteByteGo (paid newsletter $15/mo), Refind (freemium). Audience-first plays compound slowly but defensibly.
hypothesis.notes: Vision: Instagram/URL → Pod → Module learning system in Obsidian. The educational product itself. Distribution happens via the separate content/ project, which repurposes learnpod material into social posts and drives audience back here. Two-stream design: learnpod = product (subscriptions / paid pods / course), content = audience/distribution. Originally conflated — confirmed separate by Matt 2026-04-08.

next_revenue_action: Ship 1 piece of public content (LinkedIn/Twitter carousel or 90s reel) per week for 4 weeks starting 2026-04-14. Track followers as the metric.
first_dollar_path: Public content cadence → audience growth → first sponsorship OR first paid pod subscription
kill_criteria: If no measurable audience growth (>50 net new followers across channels) by 2026-06-01, reframe approach. If still flat by 2026-08-01, treat as personal knowledge tool, not income.
